nasb.text: Solomon was the father of Rehoboam, Rehoboam the father of Abijah, and Abijah the father of Asa.

esv.text: and Solomon the father of Rehoboam, and Rehoboam the father of Abijah, and Abijah the father of Asaph,

cnv.text: 所羅門生羅波安，羅波安生亞比雅，亞比雅生亞撒，

ccb.text: 所罗门生罗波安， 罗波安生亚比雅， 亚比雅生亚撒，

csbs.text: 所罗门生罗波安， 罗波安生亚比雅， 亚比雅生亚撒，
